resources.string: JAVIS uses accessibility to read screen content, interact with apps like WhatsApp, help navigate your device, and execute voice commands hands-free. No data is sent without your confirmation.
Good morning! JAVIS online. How can I assist?
Good afternoon! JAVIS ready. What do you need?
Good evening! JAVIS at your service.
Hey, it\'s late. JAVIS is here though. What\'s up?
